sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71207" key="nuktipataipla/gios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νυκτῐ-πᾰταιπλάγιος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[πλᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n71207.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">nightly-roaming-to-and-fro,</tr_> Epigr. ap.Hegesand.I.</sense> </entryFree>
